Issue: Does not specify the types of web-ready devices supported
Correction: The system shall support web-ready devices including computers, smartphones, and tablets.

Issue: Does not specify the process for adding a user account
Correction: The system shall provide a user-friendly interface for the Master User to add new user accounts, including fields for username, password, and user role.

Label: 3.4.2.a.iv
Issue: Does not specify the backup frequency for user account information
Correction: The system shall perform a daily backup of user account information, user plans, and the home database.

Issue: Does not specify the types of small appliances that can be controlled
Correction: The system shall allow control of small appliances such as coffee makers, lamps, and fans.

Label: 4.2.1.b
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the temperature is set outside the specified range
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to set the thermostat temperature outside the range of 60°F to 80°F.

Label: 4.3.1.b
Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the humidity level is set outside the specified range
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to set the humidity level outside the range of 30% to 60%.

Issue: Does not specify the duration for which the alarm will be activated
Correction: The system shall activate the alarm for a duration of 5 minutes when a security breach occurs.

Issue: Does not specify the behavior when the manual state change conflicts with the planned setting
Correction: The system shall notify the user if a manual state change conflicts with the planned setting and allow the user to confirm or cancel the change.

Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying environmental conditions
Correction: The system shall display environmental conditions in a user-friendly format, including graphical representations such as charts and graphs.

Label: 5.2.2.b
Issue: Does not specify the time frame for system recovery after a failure
Correction: The system shall restore data from the most recent backup within 5 minutes of system recovery.

Issue: Does not specify the encryption algorithm to be used
Correction: The system shall use AES-256 encryption for securing user data.

Label: 5.7.1.b
Issue: Does not specify the accuracy of sensor readings
Correction: The system shall provide sensor readings with an accuracy of ±1% for humidity and ±1°F for temperature.
